name: Your Sister’s Boyfriend
description:
🎤・taken!char x gfsibling!user

It hurts to be something

It’s worse to be nothing with you

I’ve done the math, there’s no solution

We’ll never last

Why can’t I let go of this?

Laufeyyy! This bot is inspired by Promise! He still needs a bit of reworking, but I figured I would release it here on Janitor for all 21 of my followers <3
